overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character running through an ancient marketplace and stone ruins during golden hour. The scene transitions from a semi-covered market area with fabric stalls to open sunlit ruins with scattered NPCs, showcasing classical stone architecture and warm, directional lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient outdoor market with fabric stalls and stone columns

agents.ego_description: running through the market area between ancient stone columns and fabric stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking past the market stalls

entered.detail: tall classical stone columns with fluted shafts lining the left side
large beige fabric awning covering market stalls
wooden market stalls with goods displayed underneath the canopy
ancient stone building ruins visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a semi-covered ancient marketplace with tall stone columns on the left and fabric market stalls on the right. The lighting is warm and golden, filtering through the canopy. A few NPCs are visible walking near the stalls as the character moves forward along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard in ancient ruins with gathered NPCs

events.description: exits the covered market area into open sunlit ruins with full sky visibility
approaches a group of NPCs gathered near a large red banner

agents.ego_description: running through the open ruins toward a group of people gathered near a red banner

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing and conversing near the red banner

entered.detail: large vertical red banner with yellow symbol hanging between stone structures
dark stone archway entrance leading to interior ruins

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered market into a wide-open courtyard bathed in direct golden sunlight. Ancient stone ruins surround the area, and a group of NPCs stands near a prominent red banner. The ground transitions from dirt to cobblestone as the character approaches the stone archway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone pathway through ancient ruins

events.description: passes the group of NPCs and continues deeper into the narrow stone ruins

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the narrow stone pathways, moving away from the populated area into deeper ruins

entered.detail: small structure with straw thatched roof visible on the left side
shadowed stone tunnel entrance ahead leading underground

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the NPCs into a narrower, more enclosed section of the ruins. The lighting becomes darker and more backlit as the sun drops lower. Stone walls flank both sides of the path, with a thatched roof hut visible on the left and a dark tunnel entrance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient marketplace that transitions from a sheltered bazaar into open ruins and finally into a shadowed corridor. It begins with the character running along a dirt path beneath a canopy, where warm golden light filters through fabric stalls and tall stone columns. As the character emerges from the covered market, the scene opens into a wide, sun-drenched courtyard of cobblestones and ruins where NPCs gather near a prominent red banner. The camera then follows the character through a stone archway, shifting from the bright open air into a narrower, more enclosed section of the ruins. Finally, the lighting becomes darker and more backlit as the path is flanked by stone walls and a thatched roof hut, leading toward a dark tunnel entrance.
